description: Nextain fork of vllm-project/vllm — AI-Native audio output development for Naia OS
forkPurpose: Add SupportsAudioOutput interface and MiniCPM-o audio output support; develop upstream-quality contributions
mandatoryReads: AGENTS.md — upstream vLLM AI contribution policy (supersedes all fork rules)

upstreamCompliance.priority: HIGHEST — upstream rules override fork rules

rules.duplicateCheck: MANDATORY before any upstream PR — run gh pr list search commands
rules.noLowValue: Never open single-typo or isolated style PRs; bundle with substantive changes
rules.humanDefense: Every changed line must be understood and defensible
rules.aiDisclosure: Co-authored-by trailer required in every AI-assisted commit
rules.signedOffBy: Signed-off-by trailer required (DCO) — pre-commit adds automatically
rules.preCommitMustPass: All pre-commit hooks must pass before any commit

harnessGates.description: 3 Claude Code hooks enforce upstream quality before code leaves the editor
gates: spdx-header-check.js — SPDX header on every Python file
upstream-quality-check.js — ruff-detectable anti-patterns (regex, no Python needed)
commit-ai-guard.js — AI disclosure + Signed-off-by reminder before git commit

forkBranchPolicy.experimentalWork: feature/audio-output/{desc} or fix/{desc} — fork main only
forkBranchPolicy.upstreamPR: Only after: all harness hooks pass + pre-commit passes + tests pass + duplicate check done

contextMirroring.trigger: Update both layers when context changes
